description: Closed-form golden for the refresh-path conformance fixture coupled_refresh_regrid.esm (CONFORMANCE_SPEC.md §5.10). The forcing is piecewise-constant across the cadence segments, so the regridded forcing arrays and the integrated trajectory are exact. `native_fields` are the OFFLINE loader inputs on the coarse 6-cell native grid; `regridded_fields` are the analytic result of the conservative 2:1 area-weighted coarsening onto the 3-cell sim grid (each target cell j = mean of native cells 2j, 2j+1); `trajectory` is the segmented closed-form integral. All three bindings (consumer adapters) must reproduce regridded_fields (regrid band) and trajectory (trajectory band).

regrid.comment: Planar conservative remap. Source cells are 6 unit intervals [k,k+1]x[0,1]; target (sim) cells are 3 width-2 intervals [2j,2j+2]x[0,1]. Equal overlap areas => target[j] = mean(source[2j], source[2j+1]). The distinct paired native values (e.g. 0 and 2 -> 1) make the averaging load-bearing: an identity pass-through would FAIL this golden.

trajectory.comment: Rate per segment r_k = scale*src_k: r0=[1,2,3], r1=[2,4,6], r2=[3,6,9]. Box.c(t)=sum_{k<t} r_k; Sink.d(t)=integral of Box.c, where over unit segment [k,k+1] the integral is c(k)+r_k/2.
